frames.narration: Packet of 30 bytes arrives. Bucket has space (0+30 ≤ 60). Accepted. Output rate drains 20 bytes. 10 bytes remain.
40-byte packet arrives. Bucket has 10 bytes used. 10+40=50 ≤ 60 (capacity). ACCEPTED. Output drains 20 bytes/tick. 30 bytes remain.
40-byte packet arrives. Only 10 bytes of space left (60-50=10). 10 bytes accepted, 30 bytes DROPPED. This is partial drop.
80-byte packet arrives. 80 > bucket_size(60). Packet is larger than the entire bucket. REJECTED!
